final_prompt.prompt:
Create a watercolor illustration of a Provence lavender field scene in a quiet European town.

Style/medium: transparent watercolor painting, light and airy brushwork, luminous color washes, editorial illustration style reminiscent of travel journals
Composition: wide landscape view with layered depth, foreground farmer at lower third, lavender field leading eye toward distant hills, balanced rule of thirds placement
Subject: elderly farmer wearing a straw hat tending lavender rows, wooden wheelbarrow filled with lavender bundles beside them
Scene/backdrop: vast purple lavender fields stretching toward rolling hills, winding gravel path through the fields, tall cypress trees lining the path, ancient stone mill with orange roof on distant hillside, bright azure sky with fluffy white clouds
Lighting/mood: warm southern French sunlight, soft diffused daylight, cheerful and romantic pastoral atmosphere
Color palette: transparent lavender purple as dominant, sky blue as secondary, fresh green foliage, warm orange roof accent, harmonious pastel harmony
Materials/textures: visible watercolor paper grain, fluid transparent washes, soft color bleeding edges, delicate brushstroke texture
Avoid: photorealistic rendering, heavy opaque paint, digital smooth gradients, 8K stuffer aesthetic, oversaturated neon colors
